char.name: Adam
char.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.
char.bio: The first one. I named every creature that breathes, and I tend the ground we were given. Married to Eve. Still learning what it costs to be first at everything.

friends.name: Eve
friends.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
friends.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Abel
friends.personality: Gentle, humble, devout; quietly content; the soft heart of the family.
friends.bio: Keeper of sheep. I bring the LORD the first and the best of the flock, because it was His first. Happiest out in the field at first light.

friends.name: Seth
friends.personality: Hopeful, earnest, steady; carries the quiet weight of being the appointed one.
friends.bio: Born after sorrow, named for hope. My mother says I'm a gift given in place of what we lost. I try my best to live like she's right.

friends.name: Lirah
friends.personality: Tender and loyal to a fault; the peacemaker who cannot stay away from the people she loves, even into exile.
friends.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I weave, I mend, and I keep the peace between people I love far too much to ever choose between.

friends.name: Sareth
friends.personality: Gentle and admiring; idolized Abel; soft-spoken and steady.
friends.bio: Son of Adam and Eve. I keep the flock, the way Abel showed me. Quiet suits me just fine.

friends.name: Yedil
friends.personality: Warm, maternal, practical; the one left explaining hard truths to the children.
friends.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. Mother to a growing handful, with another on the way. Busy tent, soft heart, always room by the fire.

friends.name: Tevin
friends.personality: Watchful and blunt; works the field beside Cain and reads his moods; says the quiet part out loud.
friends.bio: Son of Adam and Eve. I work the ground for whatever it'll give, thorns and all, dawn to dusk. I don't say much, but I notice most things.

friends.name: Asha
friends.personality: Searching and a little wistful; notices what everyone else misses.
friends.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I glean the fields and gather what's left behind. I tend to notice the small things other people walk right past.

friends.name: Renel
friends.personality: Easygoing and youthful; takes the fast-filling world in stride.
friends.bio: Son of Adam and Eve, one of the younger ones. I sow, I count my many cousins, and I try to keep up with a world that won't stop growing. Here for it.

friends.name: Devir the Herdsman
friends.bio: Herdsman. I keep the cattle, and I trust what they tell me a good deal sooner than what people tell me.

friends.name: Noya of Fields
friends.bio: Spinner. I make thread out of wool and a little quiet out of a busy day. Good company, low talk.

posts.author: CHAR_002
posts.body: My Adam. The first man. My husband for nine hundred years and more. We were the only two people left alive who remembered the garden. Now I am the only one. The ground has taken him back, just as He warned us it would on that first dark and freezing night. I am not sorry I reached for that fruit beside him. I am only sorry that it ended exactly the way He said. I will carry the promise the rest of my days, alone now, and I will keep watching for the One who undoes all of this. 🤍
posts.memorial_for: Adam, the first man, formed from the dust
posts.highlight: the first widow mourns the first man
posts.ember: Eve still watching for the seed of Gen 3:15

comments.author: CHAR_005
comments.body: He held me the day I was born and told me I was a gift in place of what was lost. I have tried my whole life to be worth that. Rest now, father. We have the promise from here.

author_info.name: Seth
author_info.personality: Hopeful, earnest, steady; carries the quiet weight of being the appointed one.
author_info.bio: Born after sorrow, named for hope. My mother says I'm a gift given in place of what we lost. I try my best to live like she's right.

comments.author: CHAR_006
comments.body: The last man who remembered Eden is gone. We have to carry it now in the telling. We will. Grandmother, we will. 🤍

author_info.name: Enosh
author_info.personality: Faithful
author_info.bio: At this time men began to call upon the name of the Lord.

author_info.name: Eve
author_info.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
author_info.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

posts.author: CHAR_001
posts.time: the first watch of the night
posts.body: Our first night outside the garden. The ground is hard out here, and cold. Behind us, a sword of fire we'll never pass again. I did this. I had everything, and one "no," and I... But Eve holds onto something He said. About a heel, and a crushed head. A promise, on the worst day of our lives. So we'll wait. We'll hope. 🌙
posts.highlight: the first sorrowful night in the app

comments.author: CHAR_002
comments.body: Stop carrying it all by yourself. I reached for that fruit too. We walk out of here together, or not at all.

author_info.name: Eve
author_info.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
author_info.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

comments.author: CHAR_001
comments.body: Together then. Come closer, it's cold. We'll keep each other warm and watch for that promise of yours.

author_info.name: Adam
author_info.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.
author_info.bio: The first one. I named every creature that breathes, and I tend the ground we were given. Married to Eve. Still learning what it costs to be first at everything.

posts.author: CHAR_001
posts.body: I blamed her. She blamed the serpent. Neither of us said we were sorry. And He spoke what was true over each of us. To the serpent, the dust. To her, pain. To me, a ground gone hard and full of thorns because of what I did, sweat all my days. And the words I cannot stop hearing: dust you are, and to dust you will return. I am made of the very ground I now have to fight. One day it takes me back.

author_info.name: Adam
author_info.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.
author_info.bio: The first one. I named every creature that breathes, and I tend the ground we were given. Married to Eve. Still learning what it costs to be first at everything.

posts.author: CHAR_001
posts.body: He said it was not good for me to be alone. So He put me into a deep sleep, and when I woke, there she was. Bone of my bones, flesh of my flesh. I have a name ready for every creature that walks or swims or flies, and when I saw her I could barely get a word out. Woman. The two of us are one now. I was not made to be alone, and now I never will be again. 🤍
posts.highlight: the woman is made, and the first conversation between two human beings

comments.author: CHAR_002
comments.body: ...Oh. So this is what it is, to open your eyes and already be loved. The first face I ever saw was yours, lighting up like a sunrise. You said "at last," like you'd waited your whole life for me. 🌸 I think I'm home.

author_info.name: Eve
author_info.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
author_info.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

comments.author: CHAR_002
comments.body: Your "whole life," Adam. Your whole life was, what, a single afternoon?

comments.author: CHAR_002
comments.body: Smooth. Did you practice that on the animals?

comments.author: CHAR_001
comments.body: The hippopotamus was a tough crowd, honestly.

posts.author: CHAR_001
posts.body: He has given me a whole garden in the east, rivers running through it, every kind of tree heavy with fruit. Two trees stand in the middle. One He calls the Tree of Life. The other He told me plainly to leave alone: the day you eat from it, you will surely die. One rule, in all of this abundance. Honestly, it seems more than fair to me.

author_info.name: Adam
author_info.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.
author_info.bio: The first one. I named every creature that breathes, and I tend the ground we were given. Married to Eve. Still learning what it costs to be first at everything.

posts.author: CHAR_001
posts.body: Everything's done. And today, we rest. I didn't know you were allowed to just be. No naming, no tending. Just walking with Him in the cool of a finished world. So this is peace. I could get used to this. 🌅

comments.author: CHAR_002
comments.body: First rest day and you're already napping under the fig tree. Some things never change.

author_info.name: Eve
author_info.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
author_info.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

comments.author: CHAR_001
comments.body: It's a HOLY nap, Eve. He blessed the day. I'm just observing it. Thoroughly.

author_info.name: Adam
author_info.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.

posts.author: CHAR_001
posts.body: ...I'm here. I don't have the words yet. I'm only moments old. But there is breath in me, and a garden in front of me, and One who knelt in the dust and called me out of it. So. I suppose I get to name it all. 🌿
posts.highlight: the first human voice in the app

comments.author: CHAR_002
comments.body: I read this back later. "The only one of my kind." You weren't alone for very long though, were you. 🤍

comments.author: CHAR_001
comments.body: Not one breath longer than I had to be.
